title: alysicarpus prainii
intro: Alysicarpus prainii, also known as Prain's alysicarpus or Prain's horse gram, is a perennial legume native to India and Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving gastrointestinal issues, and acting as an antiseptic. Alysicarpus prainii can be prepared into herbal remedies, including teas, decoctions, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
